name: xprite-sync-true
description: Synkra AIOX Dashboard - Real-time Monitoring with Caching & Tracing

scripts.install:packages: cd packages/api && npm install && cd ../dashboard && npm install && cd ../core && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:dashboard
scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:dashboard
scripts.lint:api: cd packages/api && npm run lint || true
scripts.lint:dashboard: cd packages/dashboard && npm run lint || true
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:dashboard
scripts.typecheck:api: cd packages/api && npm run typecheck || true
scripts.typecheck:dashboard: cd packages/dashboard && npm run typecheck || true
